bottom_line: Keep spike-then-setup for Phase-2, but first fix mutation runner coverage preemption so spikes yield real mutation signal.
coverage_notes: Analyzed S01-S03 reports and spike evidence in full; reviewed S05/S10/S11 gate reports; inspected run logs under ai-dev/logs with targeted pattern search for coverage failures, mutmut runtime errors, retries, and fix-cycle traces. No log exceeded 1 MB.

unanticipated: pytest coverage fail-under preempted mutant execution

findings.title: Coverage fail-under preempts mutation runs
findings.recommendation: Define a mutation-runner path for audit runs that does not fail early on global coverage threshold before mutants execute.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00059_S03_run1.log:99 - RuntimeError: Tests don't run cleanly without mutations
ai-dev/logs/CR-00059_S03_run1.log:503 - FAIL Required test coverage of 50.0% not reached. Total coverage: 12.28%
ai-dev/active/CR-00059/evidences/pre/cr-00059-spike-measurements.txt:53 - coverage floor exits before mutant execution
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Define a mutation audit runner path that bypasses coverage fail-under preemption (without relaxing normal quality gates), based on CR-00059 self-assess evidence in ai-dev/active/CR-00059/reports/CR-00059_self_assess_report.md.

findings.title: Measurement deliverables allow placeholder and undefined metrics
findings.recommendation: Standardize blocked-metric semantics and require rerun criteria when queue fields (like top surviving mutants) are non-actionable.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Formalize measurement-table blocked-value semantics and rerun criteria in CR templates, using CR-00059 self-assess findings at ai-dev/active/CR-00059/reports/CR-00059_self_assess_report.md.

findings.title: Prompt acceptance checks were not strict enough for first-pass closure
findings.recommendation: Tighten measurement-CR prompt contracts to explicitly reject placeholder top-5 queues and undefined score rendering at step completion.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Tighten backend/code-review prompt acceptance checks for measurement CRs (top-5 mutant queue and blocked-score semantics), informed by CR-00059 self-assess report ai-dev/active/CR-00059/reports/CR-00059_self_assess_report.md.
